items.title: Habeas Corpus Act 1816
items.description: An Act for more effectually securing the Liberty of the Subject.

items.title: Burial Ground Act 1816
items.description: An Act for enabling Ecclesiastical Corporate Bodies, under certain Circumstances, to alienate Lands for enlarging Cemeteries or Churchyards.

items.title: Civil List Audit Act 1816 (repealed)
items.description: An Act for the better Regulation of the Civil List.

items.title: Sale of Farming Stock Act 1816 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to regulate the Sale of Farming Stock taken in Execution.

items.title: Consolidated Fund Act 1816
items.description: An Act to unite and consolidate into One Fund, all the Public Revenues of Great Britain and Ireland; and to provide for the Application thereof to the General Service of the United Kingdom.
